# Clerton Araujo

> Senior Full Stack Engineer based in Berlin, Germany

## About

Clerton Araujo is a Senior Full Stack Engineer with 10+ years of experience designing, building, and scaling high-quality software across startups and multinational corporations. He holds a Master's in Computer Science (AI specialisation) and a Bachelor's in Computer Science from top Brazilian federal universities.

He is currently a Senior Full Stack Software Engineer at Doctolib in Berlin, working on Germany's national telematic healthcare infrastructure. Past employers include Issuu, LQ Enterprise, Softplan, Bradesco Bank, and HSBC.

## Contact

- Website: https://clertonraf.github.io
- Email: clertonfilho@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/clerton/
- GitHub: https://github.com/clertonraf
- Location: Berlin, Germany

## Skills

- **Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript, Java, Python, Ruby, Scala, Elixir, OCaml, SQL, COBOL
- **Frontend**: React, React Native, CSS, Design Systems
- **Backend**: Ruby on Rails, Spring, Node.js, .NET Core
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Microsoft SQL Server, Couchbase
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Datadog, Sentry
- **Practices**: Agile, CI/CD, Test Automation, System Design, GDPR, eHealth compliance

## Experience

- **Doctolib** — Senior Full Stack Software Engineer, Berlin (Oct 2021 – Present)
- **Issuu** — Full Stack Developer, Berlin (Dec 2020 – Sep 2021)
- **LQ Enterprise** — Senior Software Engineer, Berlin (Jul 2018 – Dec 2020)
- **Softplan** — Software Engineer, Florianópolis (May 2017 – Jun 2018)
- **Bradesco Bank** — Lead Software Developer, Curitiba (Nov 2016 – Apr 2017)
- **HSBC** — Senior Software Developer, Curitiba (Mar 2013 – Oct 2016)

## Education

- MSc Computer Science — Federal University of Pernambuco (2009–2011)
- BSc Computer Science — Federal University of Campina Grande (2004–2009)
